control.description-key: AI research output review and takeover control

property.name: aiAnalyticsAudit
property.description-key: JSON field containing agent research output

property.name: professionalBackground
property.description-key: Target field for professional background summary

property.name: financialSituation
property.description-key: Target field for financial situation summary

property.name: estimatedTotalWealth
property.description-key: Target field for estimated total wealth in CHF

property.name: relatedParties
property.description-key: Target field for related parties summary

property.name: sanctionCheck
property.description-key: Target field for sanction check summary

property.name: reputationalRisk
property.description-key: Target field for reputational risk summary

property.name: pep
property.description-key: Target field for PEP status summary

property.name: aiAnalysisTriggeredOn
property.description-key: Timestamp set to trigger AI draft generation flow
